headline: Is It Time To Reassess Kinder Morgan (KMI) After Its 30% One Year Share Price Gain
summary: If you are wondering whether Kinder Morgan's recent share price puts it on sale or already at a premium, looking closely at how its current price lines up with underlying value is a useful next step. The stock last closed at US$32.96, with a 30.2% return over the past year and moves of 8.1% over the last 30 days and a 2.9% decline over the past week, which can change how investors think about both upside potential and risk. Recent news around Kinder Morgan has centered on its role in North...
